form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr5) over 1650m at Bendigo, at the bell was 8th-16.36 beaten 14 m by Kyvalley Jagger (2:00.10) in 0-3 WINs on April 8 at $9. Before that was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr5) over 2080m at Cranbourne, at the bell was 5th-11.8 beaten 12 m by Desert Assassin (2:38.40) in NR up to 57 on March 29 at $1.65. Facing a tough assignment this time around.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced on the home turn.
Weakened over the final stages to finish in 10th position, beaten 50.7m.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 8th (Fr4) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 45 m by Kyvalley Jagger (2:00.10) in 0-3 WINs on April 8 at $3.40. The start before 8th (Fr5) over 1720m after racing wide at Melton, beaten 45 m by Farrokh (2:05.60) in 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $14. Draws well so can play a far greater role this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke on the first turn before trailing the field thereafter.
Gave ground over the final 500m to finish in 8th position, beaten 43.0m.
Racing marginally inside the final marker peg prior to the sprint lane.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Sr2) over 2190m at Shepparton, beaten 50 m by Attracted (2:46.00) in NR up to 50 on March 3 at $18. Two runs back posted a big 3.5 m win (Fr3) at Shepparton (2:48.80) beating Centurion Dream in 0-2 WINS on February 4 2025 at $2.90 at the bell was 2nd-3.4m 2WNC. Looking for better.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inclined to pull hard in the middle stages of the race.
Trotted roughly on the entry to the first turn when caught wide.
Broke after the start. Inconvenienced approaching the 400m by The Chook.
Pulled hard middle stages. Broke gait when clear of interference at the 400m.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Fr6) over 2080m after showing early speed at Cranbourne, beaten 35 m by Paris Kay (2:37.50) in NR up to 50 on April 3 at $8.50. Showed ability the race before when she won by 12 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr5) at this track (2:48.10) beating Alabama May in 0-3 WINs on March 26 at $1.80 at the bell was leading 4.41. Chance to bounce back.

Chance to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 300m became unbalanced and broke gait.
Utilised the sprint lane in the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into eighth behind Claudys Hero at Bendigo over 1650m in a NR 56 to 64 on March 11 at $1.95. Raced better the start before that where he won by a head after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Melton (2:03.30) beating Claudys Hero in 0W/15 0K stake on February 28 at $3.80. Can bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was well beaten into eighth behind Claudys Hero at Bendigo over 1650m in a NR 56 to 64 on March 11 at $1.95. form.formComment: Broke last start; 11th (Sr2) over 1690m at Maryborough well beaten by Karakajack Tooth (2:06.10) in 2-3 WINs on April 10 at $7.50. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 2 m as favourite (Fr5) at Cranbourne (2:41.20) beating Mista Walker in 0-2 LTW TROT on April 3 at $1.25 at the bell was leading 4.5. Capable of more than he has shown recently. Chance with manners.

form.formComment: Solid run when beaten by 2.5 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind April Sun at Maryborough over 2190m in a NR 48 to 52 on March 30 at $4.40. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing third behind Kyvalley Jagger at Bendigo over 1650m in a 0-3 WINs on April 8 at $4.80. Closing in on a win.

Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing third behind Kyvalley Jagger at Bendigo over 1650m in a 0-3 WINs on April 8 at $4.80. Closing in on a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced at approximately the 750m when attempting to improve three wide.
Pulled hard middle stages.
Began badly. Trailed the field throughout.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 3rd (Fr7) over 1690m at Maryborough, at the bell was 3rd-4 beaten 6 m by Karakajack Tooth (2:06.10) in 2-3 WINs on April 10 at $6. Two runs back was well back in the run when 6th (Fr6) over 1720m at Melton was 8th-14.37 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Farrokh (2:05.60) in 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $34. Unlikely to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Trotted roughly for a short distance near the 350m.
Galloped under pressure at approximately the 150m.
Pulled hard early and middle stages.
Shifted out in the home straight.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr6) over 1650m at Bendigo, at the bell was 2nd-3.44 beaten 3 m by Kyvalley Jagger (2:00.10) in 0-3 WINs on April 8 at $31. Could go one better.

formComments.comment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr6) over 1650m at Bendigo, at the bell was 2nd-3.44 beaten 3 m by Kyvalley Jagger (2:00.10) in 0-3 WINs on April 8 at $31. Could go one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced near the 300m when Deejay Dex began to tire.
Shifted out under pressure in the home straight on the final occasion.
